# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Implemented the pending pr-open safety remediations in src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs. The command now checks the index for pre-existing staged review-scope changes before the soft reset and fails with a dedicated StagedRealCodeWorktree error instead of sweeping manual staged edits into the squash commit. Real-code diff handling now uses an explicit review-scope filter for src/, tests/, docs/, and root config files, excluding orchestration/backlog metadata such as .ralph-burning/ and .beads/ from dirty checks, diff stats, reviewer file lists, and the no-real-code-changes decision. Added mock-port support and tests for staged-path rejection, metadata filtering in PR rendering, and metadata-only diffs producing NoRealCodeChanges.",
  "outstanding_risks": [],
  "steps": [
    {
      "description": "Inspected the existing pr_open implementation and pending amendments to identify the two remaining safety gaps: pre-reset staged changes and overly broad diff/rev
